title: Top 50 YouTube Channels by Subscribers (2026)
subtitle: Top 50 YouTube channels by subscribers, views and uploads
description:
I pulled together this dataset for a personal project where I was comparing platform growth across social media. It has the top 50 YouTube channels ranked by total subscribers as of early April 2026.

Columns are straightforward - rank, channel name, subscriber count, total video views, and number of uploads. Good for quick EDA, dashboards, or as a teaching dataset since it's small and clean.

Note: Some channels like YouTube Movies, Music, Gaming, and Sports are auto-generated by YouTube so they show 0 views and 0 uploads. That's expected, not missing data.

resources.description: Top 50 YouTube channels with subscriber, view, and upload counts
